supabase.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists
supabase.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
supabase.rateLimited: Too many attempts — wait a moment and try again
supabase.invalidEmail: That email address doesn't look valid
supabase.sessionMissing: Your session has expired — log in again
supabase.tokenExpired: The link has expired — request a new one
supabase.passwordSameAsOld: The new password must differ from the current one

generic.networkError: Couldn't reach the server — check your connection
generic.serverError: The server returned an error — try again shortly

api.flash_deadline_day_only: Flash auctions are only available during Deadline Day
api.rider_retired_auction: This rider has retired and can't be put up for auction
api.rider_pending_transfer_auction: This rider was won at auction and is awaiting transfer to the new team
api.rider_other_manager: This rider belongs to another manager
api.rider_has_active_auction: This rider already has an active auction
api.start_price_own_range: Starting price must be between 0 and the rider's Value ({value} CZ$)
api.start_price_min_value: Starting price must at least match the rider's Value ({value} CZ$)
api.start_bid_exceeds_balance: The starting bid exceeds your available balance, including active auction leads
api.auction_not_active: This auction is no longer active
api.cannot_bid_own_rider: You can't bid on your own rider
api.bid_below_minimum: Bid must be at least {min} CZ$
api.insufficient_balance_after_bids: You have {available} CZ$ left after your existing bids
api.bid_save_failed: Your bid couldn't be saved. Try again.
api.cannot_proxy_own_rider: You can't set an auto-bid on your own rider
api.proxy_below_minimum: Max limit must be at least {min} CZ$
api.insufficient_balance_after_proxy: You have {available} CZ$ left after your existing bids and auto-bids
api.proxy_save_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't be saved. Try again.
api.proxy_place_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't be placed. Try again.
api.proxy_update_failed: Your auto-bid couldn't update the auction. Try again.
api.rate_bid: Too many bids in a short time. Try again in a moment.
api.rate_market: Too many market actions in a short time. Wait a moment.
api.rate_board: Too many board actions in a short time. Wait a moment.
